tender.description: EOR to T.S.C., Thyagraj Nagar, N.D. dg 2026 27 SH Relocation of garbage collection centre from existing place to near gate 3 and deep cleaning of stadium and mirror polishing of granite for forthcoming Commonwealth Table Tennis championship 2026
